title: Zaluzianskia ancylopoda
taxonomy: Zaluzianskia ancylopoda belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant is native to South Africa and is a perennial species. It is further classified into the tribe Gnaphalieae, a group of plants characterized by their small, daisy-like flowers. The species Zaluzianskia ancylopoda is also known to be closely related to other South African Gnaphalieae species. The specific classification of Zaluzianskia ancylopoda is supported by various botanical studies and research.
